dreams: Become a renowned writer, performer, and entertainer; set family and friends up for lifelong happiness; open a nonprofit connecting students with international students (foreign-exchange book club with end-of-year visits); live near a waterfall in a home designed into the environment
lessons_attracted: Always attracting lessons about drive, responsibility, self-worth, and love
notes: Venus and Saturn conjunct her Sun in Aries 12H
text: I have my Venus and Saturn conjunct my sun in Aries 12H and my north node in in Virgo 5th house. My biggest dreams are to become a renowned writer performer and entertainer and use that money to help and include my entire family and friends so I know everyone is set for life long happiness. Also to open a nonprofit in my state that connects students with international students like a foreign exchange book club and at the end of the year you get to visit the place/person you’ve been studying and connecting with. Also I’d like to live near a waterfall and design my home to be structured in the environment around it. I feel like I’m always attracting lessons about drive and responsibility and self worth and love.

dreams: Be a well-respected public speaker and visionary creative director for major brands
lessons_attracted: Experiences that made her authentic, resilient, and fearless; learned to quit things quickly; keeps an extremely high self-concept regardless of others' judgments
life_events: Lost a lot in the last 4-5 years — the passing of her mother and nephew the biggest; total identity demolition (Uranus through her 1st house)
text: I’m a Taurus rising. 10th house Aquarius Venus. 11th house Aquarius North Node. 9th house Saturn in Capricorn. The vision I have for my life is to be a well respected public speaker and visionary creative director for major brands. I feel like I have attracted experiences that have allowed me to be authentic, resilient, and fearless. As a result, I’ve learned to quit things QUICKLY. I’ve lost a lot in the last 4 to 5 years—the passing of my mother and nephew being the biggest. I feel like my identity went through total demolition with Uranus coming through like a huge wrecking ball in my 1st house of self. I have an extremely high self-concept. However, if people were assessing my value based on the amount of people and things I’ve lost this past 5 years—they would have their own analysis. Not that I give a damn as to which conclusion they may have personally drawn.
